Lyrics.text:
1. Andriananahary
Nikarakara anay,
Ka nampitsiry vary
Ho fivelomanay!
Ny haninay tahio
Ho tonga tanjakay,
Ny hevitray tariho
Mba hiadananay.
2. Ry Rainay ao ambony,
Misaotra Anao izahay,
Fa zava-tsoa itony
Izay nohaninay.
Ny zavatra rehetra
Dia manantena Anao,
Fa tsy mba misy fetra
Ny fitiavanao.
